courseTitle: Multiplayer, Networked Play, and Live Operations
title: Daily Challenge and Live Event Game
genericDescription: Design time-limited content, daily quests, reward tracks, or rotating modifiers; motivate return play without manipulation; plan operations and communication.
specificDescription: Build a game with a simulated daily challenge or live event that changes rules, map, rewards, leaderboard conditions, or goals for a limited window. Include an event calendar, announcement copy, reset logic, fallback behavior, and rollback plan.
gradingRubric: 30 pts event/challenge design; 20 pts integration with core loop; 20 pts timer/reset reliability and communication; 15 pts operations plan; 15 pts ethical consideration.
